user_query: I just noticed Day 2 has no breakfast, my first meeting is at 9am and I'll be starving. Add a quick hotel breakfast before the meeting.

fields.name: Quick Hotel Breakfast (Lobby Restaurant)
fields.description: Quick hotel breakfast with coffee, pastries, yogurt, fresh fruit and hot options. Can be eaten in the hotel restaurant or grabbed to go for the short walk to the meeting.
fields.expected_cost: Included with stay / CAD 5-10 for extras

insertion_point.reasoning: User's first meeting is at 9:00 AM and Day 2 has no breakfast. Inserting at position 0 places a quick hotel breakfast before the 9AM Client Kickoff Meeting and allows time to walk to the meeting.
